js.home: const cate=env.get("category");const page=env.get("page");if(cate=="/"){const $=utils_1.kitty.load(await(0,utils_1.req)(env.baseUrl));const articles=$("#index article").toArray().map(item=>{const a=$(item).find("a");const id=a.attr("href")??"";let cover=$(item).find(".blog-background").css("background-image");if(cover){const match=cover.match(/url\(["']?([^"')]+)["']?\)/);cover=match?match[1]:""}const title=$(item).find(".post-card-title").text().trim();const remark=$(item).find(".post-card-info span:last").text().trim();return{id,cover,title,remark}}).filter(item=>item.id);return articles}const url=`${env.baseUrl}${cate}page/${page}/`;const $=utils_1.kitty.load(await(0,utils_1.req)(url));return $("#index article").toArray().map(item=>{const a=$(item).find("a");const id=a.attr("href")??"";let cover=$(item).find(".blog-background").css("background-image");if(cover){const match=cover.match(/url\(["']?([^"')]+)["']?\)/);cover=match?match[1]:""}const title=$(item).find(".post-card-title").text().trim();const remark=$(item).find(".post-card-info span:last").text().trim();return{id,cover,title,remark}})
js.detail: const id=env.get("movieId");const url=`${env.baseUrl}${id}`;const $=utils_1.kitty.load(await(0,utils_1.req)(url));const title=$("h1.post-title").text().trim();const cover=$("meta[property='og:image']").attr("content")??"";const desc=$(".post-content p").first().text().trim().substring(0,200);const playerDiv=$(".dplayer");let videos=[];if(playerDiv.length>0){const configStr=playerDiv.attr("data-config");if(configStr){try{let cleanStr=configStr.replace(/"/g,'"');const config=JSON.parse(cleanStr);const videoUrl=config?.video?.url;if(videoUrl){const decodedUrl=videoUrl.replace(/\\\//g,'/');videos.push({text:"播放",url:decodedUrl})}}catch(e){console.log("解析失败:"+e)}}}if(videos.length===0){const playerScript=$("script:contains('new DPlayer')").text();if(playerScript){const urlMatch=playerScript.match(/url:\s*["']([^"']+)["']/);if(urlMatch){videos.push({text:"播放",url:urlMatch[1]})}}}return{id,title,cover,desc,playlist:[{title:"默认",videos}]}
js.search: const wd=env.get("keyword");const page=env.get("page");const url=`${env.baseUrl}/search/${encodeURIComponent(wd)}/page/${page}/`;try{const $=utils_1.kitty.load(await(0,utils_1.req)(url));return $("#index article").toArray().map(item=>{const a=$(item).find("a");const id=a.attr("href")??"";let cover=$(item).find(".blog-background").css("background-image");if(cover){const match=cover.match(/url\(["']?([^"')]+)["']?\)/);cover=match?match[1]:""}const title=$(item).find(".post-card-title").text().trim();return{id,cover,title,remark:""}})}catch(e){return[]}
